description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) in Arabic script. Dated: 554 AH = 1159/60 CE. The calendar date might be 19 Jumādā II. (According to FGP the year is 529 AH = 1134/35 CE but that does not seem to match what is written in the final line before the witness signatures.) Needs examination for content.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
